chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 427 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.3944/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case (Process issued) (This matter is already fixed on 30.07.2021) 26.07.2021 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar Advocate for respondents 3 & 4 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State a/w Inspector / DSP Rana Nasrullah on behalf of SSP Ghotki, SIP Mushtaque Ali I/c SHO P.S Meerpur Mathelo and SIP Abdul Waheed Bhutto, SHO P.S Jarwar >>>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Per office note this matter is already fixed on 30.07.2021, whereas, learned counsel for respondent No.4 has filed application for urgent hearing, on the ground that the alleged detenue Mst. Kiran alias Samina has been secured by the police, therefore, the matter may be antedated and taken up in Court today. Order accordingly. Respondent No.1 present files statement on his behalf as well as on behalf of respondent No.2 along with statement of alleged detenue, same being self-explanatory, are hereby taken on record. Detenue Kiran alias Samina is present in person and has been examined. She has stated categorically that she along with two other girls was taken away by unknown culprits after administering intoxicants, as and when she regained her senses, she found herself in Sindh Province. Last night the SHO Police Station Mirpur Mathelo raided upon the houses of private respondents 3 and 4 wherefrom she has been secured and produced in Court today. The private person namely Muhammad Ali S/o Muhammad Din present in person holding CNIC # 35202-7340353-3 is her real father.

Last night the SHO Police Station Mirpur Mathelo raided upon the houses of private respondents 3 and 4 wherefrom she has been secured and produced in Court today. The private person namely Muhammad Ali S/o Muhammad Din present in person holding CNIC # 35202-7340353-3 is her real father. She further states that she has been deceived by the private respondents 3 and 4, now she would go with her father Muhammad Ali, therefore, she may be set at liberty. 2 In view of her statement, learned DPG for the State and learned counsel for the private respondents 3 and 4 submit that the purpose of instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application has been served, therefore, it may be disposed of. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is hereby disposed of. The detenue Mst. Kiran alias Samina being adult, sui-juris is set at liberty to go with her father Muhammad Ali. She further submits that she has no fear or danger at the hands of her father; however, she feels danger at hands of private respondents 3 and 4, therefore, appropriate police escort may be provided to her so that they may be able to reach safely at their destination. DSP Rana Nasrullah of Mirpur Mathelo present in Court undertakes to provide police escort to the detenue and her father from this Court to their last destination upto Sindh- Punjab Border. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application at hand, in view of above, stands disposed of along with pending applications(s), if any. Judge ARBROHI
